k008: Protocol · Diplomacy · Public Communication · Security · Communicology
k017: Editorial independence. Transparent peer review. AAB review for flagship articles. No payment for acceptance.
k032: Editorial decisions are made solely on the basis of quality, integrity, relevance and peer review. No payment, sponsorship or donation has any influence.
k034: WPA Journal has an Editorial Office, an Editorial Board and an Academic Advisory Board. Names are published only after written consent, an approved biography, a COI declaration and a Public Listing Consent.
k040: similarity / plagiarism screening with editorial judgment; no automatic percentage threshold;
k043: Double-blind for research and methodology; practitioner review for practitioner pieces; editorial review for book reviews and teaching notes. Reviewers do not know payment / waiver status.
k045: Flagship articles introducing new conceptual frameworks, or of a politically sensitive nature, undergo an additional AAB review.
k047: Accept · Accept with minor revisions · Accept with major revisions · Reject · Unsuitable for this journal.
k049: First appeal to the Editorial Office within 14 days; second appeal to the AAB within 30 days. All appeals are free.
k052: Sending an invitation and informal conversation.
k058: All correction and retraction notices are publicly available and linked to the original article.
k060: The editorial team is separate from financial operations. Waiver decisions are made by the finance team, not the editorial team.
k062: Sponsor has no influence over editorial decisions, peer review, acceptance, rejection, article ranking, authors, reviewers or journal content.
k064: The first Editorial Transparency Report is planned for December 2026.
